message:
feat(connectors): integrate Crush connector from franken_agent_detection

Adds support for indexing sessions from Charm's Crush AI coding agent.

- Enable the "crush" feature flag on the franken-agent-detection
  dependency to pull in the new CrushConnector
- Add src/connectors/crush.rs as a thin re-export module that delegates
  to franken_agent_detection::connectors::crush::CrushConnector
- Register the crush module in src/connectors/mod.rs

This allows `cass index` and `cass scan` to discover and index Crush
sessions from ~/.crush/crush.db and per-project .crush/crush.db files
alongside all other supported AI coding agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+//! Connector for Charm's Crush AI coding agent sessions.
+//!
+//! Implementation lives in `franken_agent_detection::connectors::crush`.
+
+pub use franken_agent_detection::connectors::crush::CrushConnector;
